Korean Style Short Ribs LA Galbi (갈비) Recipe

2021-01-11 17:38

LA Galbi is probably the most well known Korean dish outside of Korea. It is a sweet soy sauce marinade that even the most pickiest people will enjoy. There are many recipes but the marinade mainly consists of sugar, soy sauce, garlic and onion. The Korean pear is often added because the enyzmes help tenderize the meat making it easier to chew! In our recipe we use less soy sauce and sugar, but feel free to adjust the ratios to your and your family’s liking!


Original Recipe: link
